info.name: Woohoo_v3 -Client
info.description:
- In this protocol authentication is done via Authorization header and the header will contain Bearer token.
- The Api endpoints remain unchanged, based on the header OAuth1/OAuth2 authentications are initited.
- Along with bearer header partners are expected to mandatorily send `dateAtClient` and `signature` headers, which are used to check API integrity between Woohoo server and Partner.
- Authentication via Oauth2.0 section describes the requests required to genarate Bearer token.

exec: // pm.request.url is postman method to get url
// sicne postman doesn't substitute values in pre request scripts, doing it manually.
//pm.request.url.getQueryString() is postman method to relevent method
// pm.request.url.query.all() is postman method to get query parameters
url = requestUrl(), // This is postman method to get request URL
key = pm.variables.get("clientSecret"), // This is postman method the get consumer sceret

request.description:
- The api can be used to generate the Bearer token , which needs to be passed in all Apis
- The api expects clientId , clientSecret and Authorization Code in the request body and responds with Bearer token
- Access token has expiry of one week , which will require regenration once expired
